---
title: "project-report"
format: docx
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(ggrepel)
library(scales)
library(knitr)

load(".RData")

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
```

```{r data-build}
nba_teams <- c(
  "ATL", "BOS", "BKN", "CHA", "CHI", "CLE", "DAL", "DEN", "DET", "GS",
  "HOU", "IND", "LAC", "LAL", "MEM", "MIA", "MIL", "MIN", "NO", "NY",
  "OKC", "ORL", "PHI", "PHX", "POR", "SA", "SAC", "TOR", "UTAH", "WSH"
)

conference_lookup <- tibble(
  team_abbreviation = nba_teams,
  conference = c(
    "East", "East", "East", "East", "East", "East", "West", "West", "East", "West",
    "West", "East", "West", "West", "West", "East", "East", "West", "West", "East",
    "West", "East", "East", "West", "West", "West", "West", "East", "West", "East"
  )
)

regular_games <- games |>
  filter(
    season_type == 2,
    team_abbreviation %in% nba_teams,
    season %in% 2019:2026
  ) |>
  mutate(
    cutoff_date = as.Date(paste0(season, "-03-01")),
    season_period = if_else(game_date < cutoff_date, "pre_march", "late")
  ) |>
  left_join(conference_lookup, by = "team_abbreviation")

team_periods <- regular_games |>
  group_by(season, team_abbreviation, conference, season_period) |>
  summarise(
    games = n(),
    wins = sum(win, na.rm = TRUE),
    losses = games - wins,
    point_diff = mean(team_score - opponent_team_score, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = season_period,
    values_from = c(games, wins, losses, point_diff),
    values_fill = 0
  )

team_data <- team_periods |>
  mutate(pre_win_pct = wins_pre_march / games_pre_march) |>
  group_by(season, conference) |>
  arrange(desc(pre_win_pct), desc(wins_pre_march), .by_group = TRUE) |>
  mutate(
    conference_rank_march = row_number(),
    seed10_wins = wins_pre_march[10],
    seed10_losses = losses_pre_march[10],
    games_back_10 = pmax(
      0,
      ((seed10_wins - wins_pre_march) + (losses_pre_march - seed10_losses)) / 2
    )
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  mutate(
    late_win_pct = wins_late / games_late,
    expected_late_wins = games_late * pre_win_pct,
    win_pct_change = late_win_pct - pre_win_pct,
    expected_sd = sqrt(pmax(games_late * pre_win_pct * (1 - pre_win_pct), 0.001)),
    late_win_shortfall = expected_late_wins - wins_late,
    tanking_index = late_win_shortfall / expected_sd,
    binom_under_p = pmap_dbl(
      list(wins_late, games_late, pre_win_pct),
      \(observed_wins, total_games, expected_p) pbinom(observed_wins, total_games, expected_p)
    ),
    outside_playin_march = conference_rank_march > 10,
    likely_lottery_candidate = outside_playin_march &
      (games_back_10 >= 3 | pre_win_pct < 0.400),
    tanking_proxy = likely_lottery_candidate &
      win_pct_change <= -0.10 &
      binom_under_p <= 0.10,
    lower_left_candidate = likely_lottery_candidate &
      pre_win_pct < 0.500 &
      late_win_pct < 0.500,
    late_low_win_score = if_else(
      likely_lottery_candidate,
      pmax(0, 0.500 - late_win_pct),
      0
    ),
    tanking_signal_group = case_when(
      tanking_proxy ~ "Late collapse proxy",
      lower_left_candidate ~ "Sustained low-win signal",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    )
  ) |>
  left_join(
    draft_strength |>
      select(
        draft_year,
        avg_rating,
        elite_count,
        above_avg_count,
        top_prospect_rating
      ),
    by = c("season" = "draft_year")
  )
```

## Research Question

## Dataset Overview

```{r summary-table}
summary_table <- team_data |>
  mutate(group = if_else(likely_lottery_candidate, "Likely lottery candidates", "Other teams")) |>
  group_by(group) |>
  summarise(
    `Team-seasons` = n(),
    `Avg. pre-March win pct` = mean(pre_win_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    `Avg. late win pct` = mean(late_win_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    `Avg. win pct change` = mean(win_pct_change, na.rm = TRUE),
    `Avg. tanking index` = mean(tanking_index, na.rm = TRUE),
    `Tanking-proxy seasons` = sum(tanking_proxy, na.rm = TRUE),
    `Lower-left candidate seasons` = sum(lower_left_candidate, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

kable(summary_table, digits = 3)
```

## Exploratory Analysis

```{r visual-expected-vs-actual, fig.width=8, fig.height=5, fig.cap="Late-season performance compared with pre-March performance."}
ggplot(team_data, aes(x = pre_win_pct, y = late_win_pct)) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_point(aes(color = tanking_signal_group, shape = likely_lottery_candidate), size = 2.8, alpha = 0.80) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = team_data |> filter(tanking_proxy),
    aes(label = paste(team_abbreviation, season)),
    size = 3,
    seed = 470,
    box.padding = 0.35,
    min.segment.length = 0
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = percent_format(accuracy = 1), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Late collapse proxy" = "#C0392B",
      "Sustained low-win signal" = "#D89135",
      "Other" = "#355C7D"
    )
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Late-season performance compared with pre-March performance",
    x = "Pre-March win percentage",
    y = "March-onward win percentage",
    color = "Signal type",
    shape = "Likely lottery candidate"
  )
```

```{r visual-draft-strength, fig.width=8, fig.height=5, fig.cap="Draft strength and average late-season underperformance among likely lottery teams."}
season_summary <- team_data |>
  filter(likely_lottery_candidate) |>
  group_by(season) |>
  summarise(
    avg_rating = first(avg_rating),
    mean_tanking_index = mean(tanking_index, na.rm = TRUE),
    proxy_count = sum(tanking_proxy, na.rm = TRUE),
    candidate_count = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(season_summary, aes(x = avg_rating, y = mean_tanking_index)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, color = "#2F4858", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(size = proxy_count, fill = season), shape = 21, color = "white", stroke = 0.8, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = season), size = 3.2, seed = 470, min.segment.length = 0) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "#7FB069", high = "#B23A48", guide = "none") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(3, 8), breaks = 0:4) +
  labs(
    title = "Draft strength and late-season underperformance among likely lottery teams",
    x = "CraftedNBA average draft class rating",
    y = "Mean tanking index among likely lottery candidates",
    size = "Proxy seasons"
  )
```

## Plan Moving Forward

## Anticipated Challenges
